chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-161 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 05.05.2025 Mr. Malik Bux Mari Advocate for Petitioner. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General along with SIP Shahzado SHO PS Pano Aaqil. -.-.-. In compliance of the Order dated 23.04.2025, SSP Sukkur Respondent No.4 and SHO PS Pano Aaqil Respondent No.5 have filed their compliance reports stating therein that all the detunes Bhag Chand son of Dhamo, Chandar son of Dhamo, Mahesh son of Dhamo, Kailam daughter of Dhamo, Sht. Soomri w/o Dhamo and Sht. Samjho w/o Gordhan have been produced today before this Court who according to the Petitioner’s Counsel are all the same. In such circumstances, the present constitution Petition has served its purpose. All the detenues produced are allowed to go and live their lives freely as they are no more in detention. The minor detenues are to remain with the respective parents. Matter in the above circumstances stands disposed of. The concerned police is directed to provide them protection as their right under articles mentioned in the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan 1973. J U D G E Ali Haider
